basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Science/Commerce/Arts, NET/SET/SLET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016, Desirable: Indic knowledge in Archaeo Astronomy, Vastu Shastram, Yoga, Ayurveda etc.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Indian Scriptures Knowledge System): Master's Degree in Science/Commerce/Arts and Practitioners in Bharatiya - Indic/Sanskrit/Prakrit language and literature, lexicography, and Indian philosophy - Shastra Shikshan, including Sahitya, Darshanas, and IKS-based approaches on knowledge paradigms. Understanding in literary criticism, focusing on the Indian mind thought process and its relevance in the global context. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET / SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil. / Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments from time to time as the case may be exempted from NET/SLET/SET. Desirable: Indic knowledge in the areas of Archaeo Astronomy, Pre-Siddhantic Astronomy, Vastu Shastram, Indic Architecture - Sthapatya kala, Puranas, Navya Nyay, Manuscript ology, Veda and Vedanta, Yoga, Ayurveda and many more subjects from the linguistic, Academic and philosophical aspects of IKS. Assistant Professor (Indian Sciences Knowledge System): Master's Degree in Science/Commerce/Arts and Practitioners in Bharatiya - Indic/Sanskrit/Prakrit language and literature, lexicography, and Indian philosophy - Shastra Shikshan, including Sahitya, Darshanas, and IKS-based approaches on knowledge paradigms. Understanding in literary criticism, focusing on the Indian mind thought process and its relevance in the global context. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET / SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil. / Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments from time to time as the case may be exempted from NET/SLET/SET. Desirable: Indic knowledge in the areas of Archaeo Astronomy, Pre-Siddhantic Astronomy, Vastu Shastram, Indic Architecture - Sthapatya kala, Puranas, Navya Nyay, Manuscript ology, Veda and Vedanta, Yoga, Ayurveda and many more subjects from the linguistic, Academic and philosophical aspects of IKS.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gujarat University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.gujaratuniversity.ac.in/career.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat University Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Assistant Professor posts at Gujarat University is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Science/Commerce/Arts and have cleared NET/SET/SLET or hold a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations. Desirable qualifications include knowledge in specific Indic subjects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor positions will receive a fixed pay of Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Assistant Professor posts at Gujarat University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for Gujarat University recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Gujarat University recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor posts at Gujarat University will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Gujarat University, which is https://www.gujaratuniversity.ac.in/career.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job location is Ahmedabad, Gujarat, with the pincode 380009.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits or age relaxations for these posts. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any such information.
